member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.VR.Api.VRController
member.summary: API controller for VR video detection and playback.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VR.Api.VRController.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.ILibraryManager,MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.IMediaSourceManager,MediaBrowser.Controller.Net.IAuthorizationContext)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VR.Api.VRController.GetVideoInfo(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets VR video info for the specified item.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VR.Api.VRController.GetPlayPage(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets the VR player page for the specified item.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.VR.Configuration.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Plugin configuration for VR video support.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VR.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VR.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.DefaultFov
member.summary: Gets or sets the default VR field of view (180 or 360).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VR.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.DefaultFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets the default VR format (mono, sbs, tb).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VR.Models.VRVideoInfo.IsVR
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the video is a VR video.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VR.Models.VRVideoInfo.Fov
member.summary: Gets or sets the VR field of view: "180" or "360".

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.VR.Models.VRVideoInfo.Format
member.summary: Gets or sets the VR format: "mono", "sbs", or "tb".

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.VR.Plugin
member.summary: The main VR plugin for Jellyfin.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VR.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.VR.Services.VRDetectionService
member.summary: Service for detecting VR videos from filename, resolution, and genre/tags.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.VR.Services.VRDetectionService.DetectVRVideo(MediaBrowser.Controller.Entities.BaseItem,MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.IMediaSourceManager)
member.summary: Detects if the given item is a VR video and returns VR metadata.
member.param: The media source manager for resolution detection.
member.returns: VR video info with detection results.
